title: Tender Notice: Full Rebranding of HACOCA
description: Huruma Aids Concern and Care (HACOCA), a registered non-governmental organization based in Morogoro, Tanzania, invites qualified firms and professionals to submit proposals for the full rebranding of HACOCA. The assignment will include redesigning the organization's visual identity, logo, website, communication materials, and brand guidelines to better reflect HACOCA's mission, vision, and values.
eligibility: Interested firms/consultants must provide: Detailed technical and financial proposal; Valid business registration and tax compliance certificates; CVs of key team members; At least 3 samples of similar work for NGOs; Company/consultant profile with branding experience.
